hiringStructure.description: LuvOnPurpose uses a family-based management hierarchy. Manager positions are filled by family members or identified candidates, while Operations Coordinator positions are the primary external hires.

tier1_familyManagers.description: Family members confirmed in management roles - NOT open for external hiring

tier2_identifiedCandidates.description: Candidates identified but not yet approached (pending funding) - NOT actively recruiting

tier3_openManagers.description: Manager positions truly open for recruitment (future hiring)

tier4_operationsCoordinators.description: Primary external hire positions - selected by department Managers
tier4_operationsCoordinators.hiringNote: These are the main positions we actively recruit for. Each Coordinator is selected by their department Manager.

companyOverview.name: The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC
companyOverview.description: The L.A.W.S. Collective is a family-based enterprise dedicated to building generational wealth through education, community development, and innovative business solutions. Our L.A.W.S. framework (Land, Air, Water, Self) guides our approach to helping individuals and families achieve financial independence and purposeful living.
culture: Commitment to community impact and generational wealth
benefits: Ownership stake potential through token economy

activePostings.title: HR Operations Coordinator
activePostings.summary: We're seeking a detail-oriented HR Operations Coordinator professional to join our growing team. In this role, you'll provide essential administrative support to our HR department, helping to ensure smooth operations across recruitment, onboarding, and employee services. This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to build a career in Human Resources within a mission-driven organization.
responsibilities: Coordinate interview scheduling and candidate communications throughout the hiring process
Process new hire paperwork and maintain accurate employee files and records
Support onboarding activities including orientation scheduling and materials preparation
Track employee training completion and maintain certification records
Prepare HR reports and compile metrics for leadership review
Respond to routine employee inquiries and direct complex questions appropriately
Assist with benefits enrollment and maintain benefits documentation
Support performance review administration and tracking
Maintain confidentiality of all employee information
requiredQualifications: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree preferred
1-2 years of administrative experience, preferably in HR or related field
Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Ability to handle confidential information with discretion
Reliable internet connection for remote work
preferredQualifications: Experience with HRIS or applicant tracking systems
Knowledge of HR practices and employment law basics
Experience in a nonprofit or mission-driven organization
whatWeOffer: Comprehensive training program with HR certification path
Meaningful work supporting our community mission
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your interest in HR and our mission. In your cover letter, please describe a time when you successfully managed multiple priorities while maintaining attention to detail.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: QA/QC Operations Coordinator
activePostings.summary: Join our Quality Assurance team as an Operations Coordinator professional. You'll play a key role in maintaining our quality documentation, tracking audits and corrective actions, and ensuring our organization meets the highest standards. This position is ideal for someone who values precision, enjoys working with documentation, and wants to contribute to organizational excellence.
responsibilities: Maintain and organize quality documentation including SOPs and work instructions
Track audit schedules, findings, and corrective action completion
Coordinate quality review meetings and prepare agendas
Compile quality metrics and prepare reports for leadership
Manage document control processes including version tracking
Support internal audit activities and documentation
Maintain the corrective and preventive action (CAPA) tracking system
Assist with grant compliance documentation as needed
Ensure timely follow-up on quality-related action items
requiredQualifications: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree preferred
1-2 years of administrative experience
Strong proficiency with Microsoft Office, especially Excel
Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy
Strong organizational and time management skills
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
Reliable internet connection for remote work
preferredQualifications: Experience in quality assurance or compliance environment
whatWeOffer: Exposure to compliance and audit processes
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please include an example of how you've maintained accuracy and attention to detail in a previous role.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: Purchasing Operations Coordinator
activePostings.summary: We're looking for a Purchasing Operations Coordinator professional to help manage our procurement operations. You'll process purchase orders, communicate with vendors, track inventory, and ensure our purchasing activities meet grant compliance requirements. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys working with numbers, building vendor relationships, and keeping things organized.
responsibilities: Process purchase orders from request through completion
Communicate with vendors regarding orders, deliveries, and inquiries
Track inventory levels and assist with reorder planning
Match invoices to purchase orders and receiving documents
Maintain vendor files and contact information
Prepare purchasing reports and spending summaries
Support grant-compliant purchasing documentation
Assist with vendor evaluation and performance tracking
Maintain accurate records for audit purposes
requiredQualifications: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree preferred
1-2 years of administrative or purchasing experience
Strong proficiency with Microsoft Excel and data entry
Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail
Good communication skills for vendor interactions
Ability to manage multiple orders and priorities
Reliable internet connection for remote work
preferredQualifications: Experience with purchasing or procurement systems
whatWeOffer: Career path to Purchasing Specialist or Lead
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please describe your experience with data entry, tracking systems, or vendor communications.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: Operations Operations Coordinator
activePostings.entity: LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC (LAWS, LLC)
activePostings.summary: Join our Operations team as an Operations Coordinator professional. You'll be at the center of our day-to-day operations, coordinating meetings, tracking projects, preparing reports, and facilitating communication across departments. This dynamic role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and enjoys keeping things running smoothly.
responsibilities: Coordinate meeting scheduling and calendar management for operations team
Track project milestones and follow up on action items
Prepare operational reports and status updates
Maintain operational documentation and process guides
Facilitate cross-department communications and information sharing
Support platform operations monitoring and basic troubleshooting
Assist with onboarding coordination for new team members
Manage operational task lists and priority tracking
Prepare materials for team meetings and leadership updates
requiredQualifications: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree preferred
1-2 years of administrative or operations support experience
Strong proficiency with Microsoft Office and collaboration tools
Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities
Strong written and verbal communication skills

Reliable internet connection for remote work

Tech-savvy with ability to learn new systems quickly
whatWeOffer: Exposure to all aspects of operations
Career path to Operations Coordinator or Specialist
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please describe a time when you successfully coordinated multiple projects or priorities simultaneously.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: Education Operations Coordinator
activePostings.entity: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.
activePostings.summary: Support our Academy's mission by joining as an Education Operations Coordinator professional. You'll help manage student enrollment, track progress, coordinate with instructors, and ensure our educational programs run smoothly. This role is perfect for someone passionate about education and community development who wants to make a direct impact on learners' lives.
responsibilities: Process student enrollment and registration
Maintain student records and track progress through programs
Coordinate certificate issuance upon program completion
Schedule classes and manage instructor calendars
Respond to student inquiries and provide support
Prepare education reports and completion metrics
Support curriculum materials organization and distribution
Assist with cohort coordination for L.A.W.S. programs
Maintain learning management system (LMS) records
requiredQualifications: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree preferred
1-2 years of administrative experience, education setting preferred
Proficiency with Microsoft Office and learning management systems
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
Excellent communication skills and student-service orientation
Ability to manage multiple programs and deadlines
Reliable internet connection for remote work
preferredQualifications: Familiarity with LMS platforms (Canvas, Moodle, etc.)
Experience with adult education or workforce development
Passion for community education and development
whatWeOffer: Free access to all Academy courses
Career path to Education Coordinator or Specialist
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please share why you're passionate about education and how you've supported learners or students in the past.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: Health Operations Coordinator
activePostings.summary: Join our team as a Health Operations Coordinator to support community wellness initiatives within the L.A.W.S. framework. You'll coordinate health programs, track wellness metrics, and help community members access health resources. This role is part of our WATER pillar (Healing & Balance) and is ideal for someone passionate about community health and holistic wellness.
responsibilities: Coordinate health and wellness programs across the organization
Track community health metrics and program outcomes
Schedule and support wellness workshops and events
Maintain and update health resource directory
Process wellness program enrollments and registrations
Support mental health and healing initiatives
Coordinate with external health partners and providers
Prepare health program reports and metrics for leadership
Assist with health education content development
Support the WATER pillar healing and balance programs
requiredQualifications: 1+ years in health administration, wellness coordination, or related field
Strong organizational and coordination skills
Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities
Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace
Compassionate approach to community health support
Ability to maintain confidentiality with health information
Reliable internet connection for remote work
preferredQualifications: Background in public health or community health
Knowledge of mental health resources and support systems
whatWeOffer: Meaningful work in community health and wellness
Free access to all Academy wellness courses
Career path to Health Program Manager
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please share your experience with health or wellness programs and why you're passionate about community health.
interviewProcess: Panel interview via Microsoft Teams (30-45 minutes)

activePostings.title: Contracts Manager
activePostings.summary: We're seeking an experienced Contracts Manager to oversee all contract administration, negotiations, and compliance across our family of entities. This senior role requires expertise in contract law, vendor management, and regulatory compliance. You'll work closely with leadership to protect organizational interests while building strong partner relationships.
responsibilities: Draft, review, and negotiate contracts including vendor agreements, service contracts, and partnership agreements
Manage the full contract lifecycle from initiation through execution and renewal
Ensure all contracts comply with legal requirements and organizational policies
Develop and maintain contract templates and standard terms and conditions
Coordinate with legal counsel on complex contract matters and disputes
Track contract milestones, renewals, and expiration dates
Conduct contract risk assessments and recommend mitigation strategies
Train staff on contract procedures and compliance requirements
Maintain organized contract repository and documentation system
Report on contract performance metrics and cost savings
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Legal Studies, or related field
5+ years of contract management or administration experience
Strong knowledge of contract law and regulatory compliance
Excellent negotiation and communication skills
Experience with contract management software and databases
Detail-oriented with strong analytical abilities
Ability to manage multiple contracts and priorities simultaneously
Professional certification (CPCM, CFCM, or similar) preferred
preferredQualifications: Experience with government contracts and grants
Familiarity with intellectual property and licensing agreements
whatWeOffer: Senior leadership role with organizational impact
Career path to Chief Legal Officer or General Counsel
Ownership stake potential through token economy
activePostings.applicationInstructions: Submit your resume and cover letter. Please include examples of contract types you've managed and any significant negotiations or cost savings achieved.
interviewProcess: Final panel interview via Microsoft Teams (45 minutes)

In this role, you'll assist with contract administration, document management, and compliance tracking. This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to build a career in contract management within a mission-driven organization.
responsibilities: Maintain and organize contract files, databases, and documentation systems

Assist with vendor onboarding and compliance documentation

Free access to all Academy professional courses

activePostings.title: Design Manager
activePostings.summary: We're seeking a creative Design Manager to lead all visual design and branding initiatives across our organization. In this role, you'll establish brand identity, create design systems, and ensure visual consistency across all entities, marketing materials, and digital platforms.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain brand identity and design systems for all entities
Create visual designs for marketing, web, print, and digital platforms
Lead design projects from concept to completion
Supervise Design Operations Coordinator and creative staff
Establish design standards and style guides
Collaborate with Marketing and Media teams on campaigns
Manage design project timelines and deliverables
Review and approve all design work for brand consistency
requirements: 5+ years in graphic design, brand management, or creative direction

Strong portfolio demonstrating brand design and visual systems
Experience leading design teams or projects

steps.name: Submit Application
steps.description: Send your resume and cover letter to careers@lawscollective.org or through our application portal. Include the position title in your subject line.

steps.name: Application Review
steps.description: Our HR team reviews all applications within 2-5 business days depending on position level.

steps.name: Phone/Video Screen
steps.description: Selected candidates participate in a brief phone or video screen to discuss the role and qualifications.

steps.name: Panel Interview
steps.description: Advancing candidates meet with a panel via Microsoft Teams for a comprehensive interview.

steps.name: Skills Assessment
steps.description: Depending on the role, candidates may complete a brief skills assessment.

steps.name: Final Decision
steps.description: We aim to make decisions within 1-3 business days after final interviews.

steps.name: Offer & Onboarding
steps.description: Successful candidates receive an offer letter and begin our comprehensive onboarding program.

tips: Tailor your cover letter to explain why you're interested in our mission
Highlight relevant experience and transferable skills
Be prepared to discuss how you align with our L.A.W.S. values
Research our organization before your interview
Prepare questions to ask the interview panel

equalOpportunity: The L.A.W.S. Collective is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.
